nasb.text: (Now this man acquired a field with the price of his wickedness, and falling headlong, he burst open in the middle and all his intestines gushed out.

esv.text: (Now this man acquired a field with the reward of his wickedness, and falling headlong he burst open in the middle and all his bowels gushed out.

cnv.text: 他用不義的酬勞買了一塊田，結果倒頭栽了下去，腹破腸流。

ccb.text: 犹大用作恶得来的钱买了一块田，他头朝下栽倒在那里，肚破肠流。

csbs.text: 后来，竟然用这个人不义的酬报买了一块地。犹大一头栽倒在那里，肚腹迸裂，肠子都流出来了。
